block.text: This area proves to be full of rusting, abandoned robots. At the other side of the vault is a huge lift. The control panel has three coloured buttons, but none is marked. The lift containsa huge robot; in the dimness, you cannot make out what type it is, but it has treads and claws. If you enter the lift and push a button at random, turn to 269. If you take the small corridor beside the lift, Turn to 398.

choice.text: If you enter the lift and push a button at random.
. If you take the small corridor beside the lift.
